info.name: Full text search - Files - Tesseract OCR
info.summary: Extract searchable text from images and PDFs with Tesseract OCR
info.description:
Extension to the _Full text search - Files_ app that extracts searchable text from images and PDFs before indexing.
This app uses [Tesseract OCR for PHP](https://github.com/thiagoalessio/tesseract-ocr-for-php), which is a wrapper for the command line program [Tesseract OCR](https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract)
Tesseract must be installed locally, and configured.
info.author: Maxence Lange
